name: TOWN — Johnsons Motorcar
description:
TOWN — Johnsons Motorcar. CD album (a separate release from No Exhaust). Cover art: a blue vintage car seen through a window, with a streetlamp and a warm building façade, and a hand-drawn arched “Johnsons Motorcar” logo. A small-press, self-produced indie release.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- Indie / small-press, with a charming illustrated cover.

**Condition:** in jewel case, appears used.
